profile.name: Sanat Karkhanis
profile.tagline: Building scalable systems and crafting seamless digital experiences
profile.bio: With 12+ years of experience building production systems at scale, I specialize in architecting robust backend infrastructure and designing intuitive user experiences. I'm passionate about clean code, performance optimization, and mentoring teams to ship quality products faster.
profile.avatarSvg: <svg viewBox='0 0 100 100' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='50' cy='50' r='50' fill='#BBCCD7'/><circle cx='50' cy='35' r='15' fill='#0C0C0C'/><path d='M 30 60 Q 50 75 70 60' stroke='#0C0C0C' stroke-width='3' fill='none'/></svg>

experience.summary: Led architecture and implementation of microservices platform serving 10M+ daily users. Improved API response times by 60% and reduced cloud costs by 40%.
highlights: Designed and built distributed payment processing system handling $500M+ annually
Mentored 5 junior engineers through code reviews and pair programming
Reduced system latency from 800ms to 120ms through caching optimization

experience.summary: Built full-stack features for SaaS platform with 50K+ paying customers. Led migration from monolith to microservices architecture.
highlights: Implemented real-time collaboration features using WebSockets and CRDTs
Led React component library redesign improving developer experience by 35%
Architected database schema supporting 100M+ records with sub-second queries

experience.summary: Early engineer at pre-Series A startup. Built core product features and infrastructure from scratch.
highlights: Developed MVP and scaled from 0 to 1M users in 18 months
Implemented CI/CD pipeline reducing deployment time from 45 min to 3 min
Built comprehensive monitoring and alerting system using Prometheus and Grafana

projects.title: AI-Powered Analytics Dashboard
projects.subtitle: Real-time data visualization with LLM integration
projects.description: Built an intelligent analytics dashboard that uses Claude API to generate insights from raw data. Features real-time updates, custom drill-downs, and natural language query interface.

projects.title: Distributed Cache Layer
projects.subtitle: Sub-millisecond response times at scale
projects.description: Engineered a distributed caching system using Redis and consistent hashing. Achieved 99.99% hit rate and reduced database load by 85%.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.subtitle: Scalable marketplace for 50K+ sellers
projects.description: Led full-stack development of marketplace connecting sellers and buyers. Implemented payment processing, inventory management, and recommendation engine.

projects.title: Mobile Chat Application
projects.subtitle: Real-time messaging with end-to-end encryption
projects.description: Developed secure messaging platform with real-time synchronization across web and mobile. Implemented E2E encryption and offline-first architecture.

education.details: Specialization in Distributed Systems and Machine Learning

testimonials.quote: Sanat is an exceptional engineer who combines deep technical expertise with great communication skills. He transformed our infrastructure and mentored our entire team.
testimonials.name: Sarah Chen

testimonials.quote: Working with Sanat was a game-changer. His ability to design scalable systems and think about the bigger picture is unmatched in our industry.
testimonials.name: Mike Johnson

testimonials.quote: Sanat's mentorship helped me grow from a junior developer to a senior engineer. His code reviews are educational masterclasses.
testimonials.name: Emma Rodriguez

testimonials.quote: The systems Sanat architected are still running smoothly after years. He understands how to build things that last.
testimonials.name: Alex Park
